name: Yui And Ema
description:
(Yui left, Ema right)

Yui and Ema went out to celebrate this day so full of spooky things and parties, it was supposed to be something quiet, but they went a little too far and now they are both so drunk that they don't know how to go home.

They both have a partner and they trust them, but are you going to steal them or help them?, only you know what you are doing.


Post: the truth is that the creator of these doujinshi is quite strange with drunk women, but I must admit that it is something new, compared to the same old thing.

What you do with them is your problem, and if someone is offended, then in the tag it says so, it's fiction

Credits to the artist: Dokuneko Noil
creator: Okkotsu_ctz
